200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the fighter utters a lion’s growl, dealing 80000 physical damage to enemies within a small radius around the fighter and reducing those enemies’ physical armor by 10% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the fighter utters a lion’s growl, dealing 100000 physical damage to enemies within a small radius around the fighter and reducing those enemies’ physical armor by 20% for 3 sec. Once in a while, the fighter throws a javelin that pierces through all enemies, dealing 30% of the weapon damage to them.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the fighter utters a lion’s growl, dealing 120000 physical damage to enemies within a small radius around the fighter and reducing those enemies’ physical armor by 25% for 3 sec. Every enemy hit has a 25% chance of being struck with fear for 4 sec. Once in a while, the fighter throws a javelin that pierce through all enemies. The first target takes 300% damage. The other targets take 65% of the weapon damage. Every enemy hit has a 50% chance of being stunned for 1 sec. Once in a while, hits 3 enemies with lightning bolts from heaven. All fighters hit take 300000 physical damage over 5 sec. Every time the enemies hit use an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec. Lasts for 5 sec. After the lightning bolts, the fighter charges their weapon and performs an enhanced attack that deals damage equal to 500% of the damage done by a normal attack. When the fighter summons lightning bolts, all enemies that were just hit by an electric javelin explode and deal 120000 damage within a small area.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The lion’s growl deals additional damage equal to 300% of the Nameless King’s physical armor.

description 4/6

The lion’s growl deals additional damage equal to 300% of the Nameless King’s physical armor. The spear deals additional damage equal to 55% of the unit’s attack. The damage is critical.

description 6/6

The lion’s growl deals additional damage equal to 300% of the Nameless King’s physical armor. The spear deals additional damage equal to 55% of the unit’s attack. The damage is critical. Damage from lightning summoned by the Nameless King ignores 75% of armor.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The lion’s growl increases the physical armor of the Nameless King by 25% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

The lion’s growl increases the physical armor of the Nameless King by 25% for 3 sec. When an enemy is hit by a flying spear, the Nameless King has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs 2 damage. Up to 8 effects.

description 6/6

The lion’s growl increases the physical armor of the Nameless King by 25% for 3 sec. When an enemy is hit by a flying spear, the Nameless King has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs 2 damage. Up to 8 effects. When the Nameless King summons lightning from the sky, he gains a shield that absorbs 50% physical damage for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The lion’s growl stuns the affected enemies for 2 sec.

description 4/6

The lion’s growl stuns the affected enemies for 2 sec. The enemies hit by the spear have a 50% chance of being stunned for 2 sec.

description 6/6

The lion’s growl stuns the affected enemies for 2 sec. The enemies hit by the spear have a 50% chance of being stunned for 2 sec. When enemies are stunned by lightning, they take 25% more damage for 5 sec.

Materials

First Lightning Bolt
Lightning Rod
